description_for_human: Compare insurance policies side-by-side and identify coverage gaps

functions.name: show-policy-comparison
functions.description: Show an interactive side-by-side comparison matrix of 2-4 insurance policies with color-coded cells

functions.name: show-gap-analysis
functions.description: Show a visual gap analysis highlighting under-coverage with risk scenarios and severity ratings

functions.name: show-policy-detail
functions.description: Show a detailed entity card for a single insurance policy

functions.name: show-recommendation
functions.description: Show recommended actions to improve coverage with estimated cost impact

functions.name: search-policies
functions.description: Search and filter insurance policies by type, carrier, or minimum coverage amount

functions.name: add-policy
functions.description: Add a new insurance policy to the comparison set

functions.name: remove-policy
functions.description: Remove a policy from the comparison set

functions.name: get-policy-summary
functions.description: Get a detailed text summary of a specific policy

functions.name: calculate-gap-score
functions.description: Calculate a numeric coverage gap analysis score with category breakdown

functions.name: get-quote-estimate
functions.description: Estimate the premium impact of a coverage change

tools.name: show-policy-comparison
tools.title: Compare Policies
tools.description: Show an interactive side-by-side comparison matrix of 2-4 insurance policies with color-coded cells.

policyIds.description: Array of 2-4 policy IDs to compare

tools.name: show-gap-analysis
tools.title: Gap Analysis
tools.description: Show a visual gap analysis highlighting under-coverage, overlapping coverage, with risk scenarios.

policyIds.description: Policy IDs to analyze. If empty, analyzes all.

tools.name: show-policy-detail
tools.title: Policy Details
tools.description: Show a detailed entity card for a single insurance policy.

tools.name: show-recommendation
tools.title: Recommendations
tools.description: Show recommended actions to improve coverage with estimated cost impact.

policyIds.description: Policy IDs to analyze. If empty, analyzes all.

tools.name: search-policies
tools.description: Search and filter insurance policies by type, carrier, or minimum coverage amount.

type.description: Policy type: homeowners, auto, life, umbrella

tools.name: add-policy
tools.description: Add a new insurance policy to the comparison set.

policy.description: Full policy object as JSON string

tools.name: remove-policy
tools.description: Remove a policy from the comparison set.

policyId.description: The ID of the policy to remove

tools.name: get-policy-summary
tools.description: Get a detailed text summary of a specific policy for model context.

tools.name: calculate-gap-score
tools.description: Calculate a numeric coverage gap analysis score with category breakdown.

policyIds.description: Policy IDs to analyze. If empty, analyzes all.

tools.name: get-quote-estimate
tools.description: Estimate the premium impact of a coverage change such as increasing limits or adding coverage.

policyId.description: The policy ID to estimate changes for
